orderId.description: ID of the refunded transaction in P24 system

sessionId.description: ID of the refunded transaction in Partner's system

merchantId.description: Merchant's ID of whose account the refund is performed

requestId.description: ID of refund request provided in transaction/refund

refundsUuid.description: ID of refund request in Partner's system provided in transaction/refund

amount.description: Refund amount expressed in lowest currency unit, e.g. 1.23 PLN = 123

timestamp.description: Time of sending the refund notification provided in UNIX timestamp

status.description: Status of the executed refund. 0 - completed, 1 - rejected

sign.description:
Checksum of parameters:
{"orderId":int,"sessionId":"str","refundsUuid":"str","merchantId":int,"amount":int,
"currency":"str","status":int,"crc":"str"}

calculated with the use of sha384

IMPORTANT!:
in case json_encode function is used, the following attributes should be added
"JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES"
